title: Support - App, user not logged ever, no data
scenario: Support section shows "None" for Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID when accessed as a Guest user after onboarding
steps: 2. On the Welcome screen, tap 'Continue as Guest' (do not log in).
4. On the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
6. Observe the displayed information under the Support section.
expected: Support section should show accurate data: App version and App ID are correct. Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID should be hidden, blank, or show 'N/A' (since the user is not logged in). Last Connected should show 'N/A' or a reasonable default.
